text:
Created attachment 219472
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: patch to bump to 1.22.1

This patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.21.2 to 1.22.1. From a ports perspective, this update is a simple version bump with no further changes required. The synapse changelog is included in the PR's URL field.


portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 121amd64)
do-test: OK (PASSED (skips=15, successes=1255), Ran 1270 tests in 527.784s)

I've also tested the resulting package on my own server and things seem to be running smoothly.

Cheers,
Sascha
